original text:
If you're looking for self-catering holiday cottages in Filham then Waterside Lodge are well equipped for the task. Our fully equipped family sized lodges offer a comfortable luxurious stay for a fantastic price, giving you beautiful views of the lakes and the surrounding countryside. Offering luxurious self-catering holidays in our fully featured Scandinavian holiday lodges. Perfectly located to explore the beaches, coastline. All of our lodges are sized for 6 people and are furnished to the highest standards to ensure you have a stay like no other. At Waterside Lodge the stay itself is only half of the package, Waterside lodge is situated closely to the Heritage Coast which makes our lodges the perfect stay for anyone wanting to get away and have a relaxing countryside break from the city. Whilst you stay with us be sure to take advantage of all the activities Waterside Lodge has to offer. Such as the use of our on-site fishing lakes for the keen fisherman, free internet access, outside relaxation areas, comfortable lounges and much more.
Looking for self-catering holiday cottages in Filham has just become a lot easier. Our Lodges have fantastic, spacious master bedrooms which include a new king sized bed where you can lie down in comfort and enjoy the beautiful views. The comfortable lounges are equipped with 2 sofas, 37" flat screen colour TV with Freeview and digital recorder, DVD player and CD/Digital radio with direct access through patio doors onto wrapped decking which overlooks extensive rear grounds. Outside of Waterside Lodge, the surrounding areas has a lot to offer. As we are set off the coast, we have the pleasure of living in one of the nicest areas of countryside in the UK, everything you would want when you are looking for self-catering holiday cottages in Filham. Barnstable and Bideford are only a short distance away and are great local towns to explore and visit where you will be greeted with friendly locals and quirky shops.
If you are a keen fisherman then Waterside Lodge is the one for you. There is exclusive access to fresh water fishing stations. The 2 fishing lakes are plentifully stocked. The top lake with Carp (to 26lb), Rudd, Bream and Tench. Bottom lake with Carp (to 10lb) and Rudd. So if our first class service, attractions, and superb facilities have everything you desire for self-catering holiday cottages in Filham please contact us on 07850 590990 or 01327 705010 or email info@waterside-lodge.co.uk. We look forward to hearing from you soon.
